title: CubesidePack
body: # CubesideMod The modpack contains a lot of performance mods, a voice chat and the server own CubesideMod. # Cubeside Server The CubesideModpack is the right pack to play on the German Minecraft server Cubeside.de. Cubeside has been around since 2011 and is one of the oldest German Minecraft servers. Among other things, we offer Freebuild, SkyBlock, Creative, Games and Challenges. You can find all further information on our website. :D
